chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1. C.P No.D-716 of 2014 2. C.P No.D-1774 of 2014 3. C.P No.D-1604 of 2018 4. C.P No.D-1601 of 2019 5. C.P No.D-1604 of 2019 6. C.P No.D-1605 of 2019 7. C.P No.D-1642 of 2019 8. C.P No.D-602 of 2021 9. C.P No.D-765 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 04.11.2021. M/s. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Muhammad Aslam Khan, Ghulam Sarwar Baloch, Muhammad Issa Behan, Agha Waqar Ahmed and Mohsin Raza Gopang, Advocates for petitioner(s). M/s. Muzammil Bughio & Zaheeruddin Sahtio, Advocates for SBCA. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. Advocate General, Sindh. = Learned counsel for the petitioner(s) under instructions do not press the captioned petitions in terms of orders dated 27.05.2021 and 02.06.2021 along with pending applications therein. In view of the above facts and circumstances of the case, the petitions and applications pending therein are dismissed as not pressed, however, with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE *Hafiz Fahad*
